{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Nye grace
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] used [[Nye grace]] to land on his feet.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
